title: Accident report form
instruction: Read this accident report. Choose the correct word for each gap.
passage: On 14th February 2026, at approximately 10:30am, an ___ occurred at 32 John William Street, Huddersfield. The ___ is Maria Santos, date of birth 12/06/1989. She slipped on a wet floor near the entrance. The ___ of the accident was a wet floor with no warning sign. Maria ___ her right wrist. She was taken to Huddersfield Royal Infirmary by ___. The incident was ___ to the manager at 11:00am.
